query: mixed color temperature sodium vapor orange streetlight clashing fluorescent night urban
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: mixed color temp — sodium vapor orange vs blue twilight, clashing artificial light sources, desolate urban night

response.objective_caption: An elevated nighttime view of a two-story building with an extended overhanging roof and rows of windows on both levels, situated behind an empty paved parking lot with painted white lines. A dual-lamp streetlight stands near the building's corner, illuminating the upper facade and awning structure. The surrounding landscape and sky are not visible in the darkness.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An elevated nighttime view of a two-story building with an extended roof and rows of windows, seen across an empty parking lot. Extreme underexposure devours nearly the entire frame in crushed black shadows, leaving only fragments of the facade visible under a harsh streetlamp. A sickly yellow-orange sodium vapor cast washes across the building surfaces, and the overwhelming darkness combined with the isolated, empty setting generates an atmosphere of dread and unease.
